markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on 2026 content strategy and roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**2026 Roadmap:** GrowthX will draft a H1 2026 content roadmap for a 45-min strategy session in the week of Jan 21, timed to align with the March contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** The roadmap will prioritize content for the psychiatry go-to-market and new insurance-first landing pages, leveraging Innerwell's 80M covered lives.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**New Service:** Innerwell is launching an MVP for Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) using Naltrexone; content support is on hold pending a viability assessment by late February.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will swap the "autism" topic from this week's batch of 5 articles and continue building the Ketamine cluster while refreshing 8 strategic older articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Topics

### 2026 Content Roadmap & Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Develop a H1 2026 roadmap to guide content efforts and align on strategy before the March contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will draft a proposal → Innerwell will provide input in a 45-min strategy session during the week of Jan 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Strategic Initiatives

  - [**Psychiatry Go-to-Market:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Innerwell is launching a formal go-to-market campaign for its psychiatry service.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Internal testing shows psychiatry is the second-highest ROI service after Ketamine.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will develop a content strategy and keyword research plan, adapting the successful Ketamine cluster model.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [**Insurance-First Landing Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create dedicated landing pages for major insurance providers.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capitalize on Innerwell's 80M covered lives and capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Model:** Talkspace's programmatic SEO approach (templated pages per insurer) was cited as a reference.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [**Condition-Specific Landing Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create dedicated landing pages for top conditions (e.g., anxiety, depression).](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture search traffic for high-volume terms like "ketamine therapy for anxiety."](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [**Model:** Talkspace's "treatments" section and Brightside's "conditions we treat" section were cited as references.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [**Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) MVP:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Innerwell is launching a new program for AUD using Naltrexone.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Target User:** Individuals who binge drink and want to reduce intake, but are not ready for rehab.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Status:** Launching an MVP in the next few weeks to test viability.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Content:** Support is on hold pending a viability assessment by late February.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Ongoing Content Production

  - [**Ketamine Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Production continues; 5 new articles are due this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Correction:** The "autism" topic must be swapped out.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [**Article Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [8 strategic articles identified by GrowthX will be refreshed to meet current quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Note:** These are distinct from articles Innerwell requested not be altered.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Image Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
      - [New, higher-quality images have been backdated into all 8 staged articles and \~1/3 of the Ketamine cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [**Tone Correction:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [Future content must use more layman's terms and avoid excessive medical jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Swap the "autism" topic for this week's 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Continue building the Ketamine cluster and refreshing 8 strategic articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Scope content strategy for the psychiatry go-to-market.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
      - [Consult Jacob on insurance and condition-specific page strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [Draft the H1 2026 content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [Send a Slack update to Akina next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Akina:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Review the 5 new articles upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [Meet for a 45-min strategy session during the week of Jan 21.](https://fathom.video/share/Cxt48CAcs7yodzPGTH1Q9Z6LQQ2WQwvG?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
